content.hint: 用具体比例表达进展，避免模糊词汇如 'good' 或 'a lot'
content.situation: 在周会中，经理询问你负责的市场推广活动进展，你需要简明汇报当前状态和关键成果。
content.speakerText: How's the digital campaign progressing this week?
content.speakerTextCn: 这周数字营销活动进展如何？
content.responseTemplate: We've reached ___ of our goal—significantly better than last week.

content.hint: 请回忆项目进展汇报中常见的问题
content.scenarioHint: 项目进展中遇到的主要障碍是什么？
content.knowledgePoint: 口语表达和项目进展汇报
content.responseTemplate: 有什么___阻碍拖慢进度吗？

content.hint: 客户入驻项目的进展情况
content.scenarioHint: 您想询问客户入驻项目的进展情况
content.knowledgePoint: 口语表达：询问项目进展
content.responseTemplate: So how's the _______________ project coming along?

content.hint: 说明问题时要带出你正在采取的行动，体现解决问题的态度

blanks.answer: working closely with the IT team
options: working closely with the IT team
not sure if it will be fixed
waiting for someone else to act

content.situation: 团队领导关心你负责的系统升级项目是否有延误风险，你需要如实反馈当前障碍并体现主动性。
content.speakerText: Are there any issues holding up the system upgrade?
content.speakerTextCn: 有什么问题阻碍了系统升级吗？
content.knowledgePoint: 问题反馈 + 主动解决倾向
content.responseTemplate: There’s a slight delay with the security patch, but we’re ___ to resolve it by Friday.

content.hint: 用适度的限定词表达仍有改进空间的部分，避免全盘否定或过度乐观
content.situation: 你向主管汇报客户支持流程优化项目的整体状态，需要概括性总结当前成效和剩余挑战。
content.speakerText: What’s the overall status of the support workflow improvement?
content.speakerTextCn: 客户支持流程优化的整体状态如何？
content.knowledgePoint: 平衡肯定成果与指出待改进点
content.responseTemplate: We’ve improved response times significantly, though ___ still need attention.

content.hint: 表达基本达成目标但仍有小缺口时的常用措辞
content.template: We’ve hit ___ of our KPIs, just behind on two clients.
content.knowledgePoint: 场景功能表达（用 most 表达接近完成）
